videoSnippet.title: Are You Starting To Believe? || Yağız Kaan Erdoğmuş vs Nils Grandelius || TePe Sigeman & Co 2026

Erdogmus, Yagiz Kaan (2708) - Grandelius, Nils (2662) 
TePe Sigeman & Co Chess Tournament 2026 (Chess.com) [04] 2026.05.04
C64 Ruy Lopez, classical defence, Benelux variation

judgment.comment: Checkmate is now unavoidable. Kg5 was best.
